description: Navigation toolbar for the scheduler with previous/next/today buttons, a date title, and view switcher tabs (Day, Week, Month, Agenda, Timeline). Typically used internally by TmScheduler.

examples.title: Standalone toolbar
examples.code: <TmSchedulerToolbar View="TmScheduleViewType.Month" CurrentDate="DateTime.Today" OnViewChange="@HandleViewChange" OnPrev="@HandlePrev" OnNext="@HandleNext" OnToday="@HandleToday" />
